scope_note: QA Self-Pumped Phase Conjugate Cert [523]. Primary sources: Feinberg J. (1982) 'Self-pumped, continuous-wave phase conjugator using internal reflection' Opt. Lett. 7(10):486-488 DOI 10.1364/OL.7.000486; Cronin-Golomb M., Fischer B., White J.O., Yariv A. (1984) 'Theory and applications of four-wave mixing in photorefractive media' IEEE J. Quantum Electron. 20(1):12-30 DOI 10.1109/JQE.1984.1072018; Zel'dovich B.Ya., Pilipetsky N.F., Shkunov V.V. (1985) 'Principles of Phase Conjugation' Springer ISBN 978-3-540-13458-4 (self-pumped geometries). CLAIM (exact, falsifiable): the SELF-PUMPED phase conjugator -- the internal-reflection ('cat') mirror that supplies NO external pump -- is realized in the QA additive group on the A1 alphabet {1,...,m}. Internal reflection self-generates the counter-pump p_b = qa_neg(p_loop) from the loop field, and the FWM output fwm(p, p_b, s) = qa_mod(p + qa_neg(p) - s) = qa_neg(s). (C1 PUMP_INDEPENDENCE) fwm(p, qa_neg(p), s) = qa_neg(s) for ALL self-pumps p and signals s (exhaustive over {1,...,m}^2) -- so the output is independent of the self-generated pump, which is precisely why the mirror needs no external reference beam. (C2 SELF_STARTING) with a self-pump that wanders arbitrarily from a noise seed, the output stays locked to qa_neg(s) (pump-independence in action). (C3 THRESHOLD) the loop amplitude obeys A' = g*A/(1+A) with fixed points A=0 (all g) and A*=g-1 (g>1); the mirror self-oscillates only for gain g>1 (self-pumped reflectivity threshold g_c=1), decays to A=0 for g<=1; g=1 is the marginal edge (A_n ~ 1/n -> 0). Gain g and amplitude A are OBSERVER-layer reals (Theorem NT), never QA state. (C4 SELF_PUMPED_DC) the distortion-correction theorem holds SELF-REFERENCED: a signal aberrated by phase screen phi, self-pumped-conjugated (any self-pump, no external beam), and returned through the SAME phi recovers qa_neg(s) exactly for all s,phi (exhaustive m x m); a different return screen phi' leaves the residual qa_mod(-s + phi' - phi) (same-medium specificity). (C5 A1_RANGE) every phase operation stays in {1,...,m}. Context: the self-starting cousin of cert [518] (which SUPPLIES the pumps); distinct from cert [519] (a phase-conjugate resonator driven by stored patterns) in that here the pump is internally generated. Reference implementation: qa_self_pumped_conjugator.py (repo root, axiom-linter clean; PUMP_INDEPENDENCE 576/576, SELF_STARTING 200/200, threshold sweep, self-referenced distortion correction). Companion certs: [518] (external FWM conjugator), [519] (phase-conjugate holographic memory), [522] (time-reversal focusing). Author: Will Dale + Claude 2026-07-11. All phase arithmetic integer on {1,...,m} (A1/S2); observer boundary crossed exactly twice (Theorem NT); gain/amplitude are observer-layer.
